itinerary.route: Reykjavík → Silfra → Þingvellir → Geysir → Gullfoss → Kerið → Reykjavík
itinerary.title: Golden Circle

itinerary.route: Vík → Fjaðrárgljúfur → Skaftafell → Fjallsárlón → Jökulsárlón → Höfn
itinerary.title: Glaciers & Icebergs

itinerary.route: Höfn → Klaustur → Laki via F206 → Klaustur
itinerary.title: Laki & the Highlands

itinerary.route: Arnarstapi → Snæfellsnes north → Borgarnes → Keflavík → Boston
itinerary.title: Snæfellsnes North & Home

notes.text: We flew. We landed. We coded the Iceland app all the way.

One game down...we were all rooting for Norway. Alas...

Thanks to the Coops for hosting game 1 and the Pepp for game 2! Will Switzerland hold out?!?!
